0.text: Bronchiectasis in both lungs, particularly in the lower lobe of the left lung

1.text: Peribronchial thickening in both lungs, particularly in the lower lobe of the left lung

2.text: Ground-glass densities around the peribronchial thickenings, especially in the lower part of the left lung

3.text: Ground-glass densities in the inferior lingular segment of the left upper lobe

4.text: Focal ground-glass opacity in the anterior segment of the right upper lobe
